title: XLSX extraction returns no output data
symptom: When using the Extract from File module with an XLSX file containing only one record, it returns 'No output data returned'.
applies_when: Processing an XLSX file with one record
root_cause: The Extract from File module requires the 'Include Empty Cells' option to be enabled when processing XLSX files with only one record. Without this option, it does not output any data.
fix_steps: Open the Extract from File module settings
Re-run the workflow with the XLSX file
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Include Empty Cells' option in the Extract from File module settings.
